title: SD-JWT session token for off-chain proof reuse

artifacts.description: Specification for SD-JWT session token structure: claims layout (nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, humanMerkleRoot, agentCredentialHash, exp, iat, iss), selective disclosure map, and verifySessionToken() contract
TypeScript implementation: issueSessionToken(handshakeResult, ttl) and verifySessionToken(token, opts) using jose or sd-jwt-vc library
Re-export issueSessionToken and verifySessionToken from public API
Python implementation: issue_session_token() and verify_session_token() using python-sd-jwt + PyJWT, mirroring TS claim structure
Expose issue_session_token and verify_session_token in the Python public API
Unit tests: token issuance after mock handshake, expiry enforcement, tampered signature rejection, selective disclosure of nullifierHash only, round-trip verify
Python pytest suite mirroring TS tests: issue, verify, expiry, tamper, selective disclosure
Add session token section: one-time handshake → issueSessionToken → subsequent calls with verifySessionToken, latency comparison table (full ZKP ~2s vs JWT <1ms)

steps: Define SD-JWT claim schema in spec/session-token-sd-jwt.md: required claims (iss, iat, exp, nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, humanMerkleRoot, agentCredentialHash), optional disclosable claims (modelHash, operatorDID), and signing key conventions (HMAC-SHA256 shared secret or EdDSA keypair)
Add sd-jwt / jose dependency to sdk/package.json; confirm python-sd-jwt added to sdk-python/pyproject.toml alongside existing PyJWT dep

Implement sdk/src/session.ts: issueSessionToken(result: HandshakeResult, secret: Uint8Array, ttl?: number): string — packs verified nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, humanMerkleRoot, agentCredentialHash into SD-JWT; verifySessionToken(token: string, secret: Uint8Array): SessionClaims — validates signature + exp, returns decoded claims
Implement sdk-python/bolyra/session.py mirroring the same interface; reuse PyJWT for signature, python-sd-jwt for selective disclosure envelope
Wire issueSessionToken call into the existing proveHandshake / verifyHandshake flow as an optional post-step — do not break existing API, make session token opt-in via options flag

Write sdk/test/session.test.ts covering: valid round-trip, expired token rejection, signature tamper rejection, selective disclosure (only disclose nullifierHash, hide scopeCommitment), clock skew tolerance param
Write sdk-python/tests/test_session.py with equivalent pytest coverage
Run npm test and pytest -v; confirm all new and existing tests pass
Update sdk/QUICKSTART.md with session token usage example and latency context
Update spec/session-token-sd-jwt.md with final claim names, version, and interop notes between TS and Python implementations
dependencies: jose (TS) or sd-jwt-vc for selective disclosure envelope in Node
verifyHandshake() return shape must expose nullifierHash and scopeCommitment for token packing
